nanos: Package.Subscribe('Load').description: Subscribe to the package Load event (fires once when the package starts).

nanos: Package.Subscribe('Unload').description: Subscribe to the package Unload event (fires when the package is unloaded).

nanos: Events.Subscribe.description: Subscribe to a custom nanos world event.

nanos: Events.Call.description: Trigger a custom nanos world event on the current side.

nanos: Events.CallRemote (server->client.description: Call a remote event from server to a specific client (or Events.BroadcastRemote for all clients).

nanos: Timer.SetTimeout.description: Run a function once after a delay in milliseconds.

nanos: Timer.SetInterval.description: Run a function repeatedly on an interval in milliseconds.

nanos: Character spawn.description: Spawn a Character actor at a location.

nanos: require Package.description: Require a file from the current package.

nanos: Package.Export.description: Export a function from the package so other packages can access it.
